notes: UPlay updates and works fine. No issues
title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands™

notes: It runs fine after an updated version of Uplay is linked to the game's prefix folder. Performance is almost perfect with a few moments between large area when it has major stutters. The Uplay "Shift + f2" prompt will not go away, and the key combo does not work.
title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands™

notes: The game works on Proton out of the box, but not at the first run. I had to start it multiple times until the Uplay launcher updated itself, then I had to login and I had to enter the key too. After that the game worked fine. I installed D9VK and it worked even better with this DX9 to Vulkan translation.
title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands™
